strNotes: Allows coveralls to be worn underneath EVA Suits (but not pressure suits due to clipping). Disallows wearing the Ayotimiwa hoodie and grey port shirt with the brown duster due to clipping issues. Gives the gunmetal and yellow coveralls additional inventory slots to match the other suits. Purple coveralls get additional inventory equal to cargo (not harness) pants. NPC loot tables are altered to include coveralls alongside EVA suits.
